description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring white brick exterior walls and a flat roof. Large windows are distributed along the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The interior layout is visible, showing distinct rooms including a living area, kitchen, and bedrooms, with modern furnishings and open-plan design. Outdoor furniture, such as tables and chairs, is placed adjacent to the building, suggesting a small patio or garden area. The structure appears modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, and the roof is flat with no visible overhangs or eaves. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on functionality and open space.
description: A modern, single-story white brick bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and visible interior rooms. Outdoor furniture suggests a patio or garden area.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial rear of the bungalow, highlighting the white brick walls, large windows, and a glimpse into the living and kitchen areas.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible here, with multiple large windows and a door, as well as outdoor furniture arranged in front, indicating the main entrance and patio area.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the length of the bungalow, the arrangement of windows, and the open-plan interior layout, with some outdoor furniture visible to the left.
description_view_3: The rear of the bungalow is shown, with fewer windows and a more enclosed appearance, as well as a clear view of the flat roof and back rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped large windows on front and side facades
